const DEFAULT_CONTROL_COMPONENTS = [
  'input',
  'meter',
  'output',
  'progress',
  'select',
  'textarea',
];

let axElements: Map<
  { name: string; attributes?: { name: string; value: string }[] },
  string[]
> | null = null;

const angularDecoratorsPattern = toPattern([
  'Component',
  'Directive',
  'Injectable',
  'NgModule',
  'Pipe',
  'Service',
]);
